items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only
If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on the links under Public Content prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Reconvene to Regular Session at Approximately 7:00 p.m.
Report Out on Closed Session from March 20, 2024
Report Out on Closed Session from April 3, 2024
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 11.2 pulled due to a family emergency. President Lawson stated: 'We need to pull item 11.2 due to a family emergency. That will come back to us at a later meeting.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Is there a motion to approve? I will make a motion to approve consent items. I'll second. All those in favor.

items.intro_words: Welcome, everybody. Sorry, we're running a few minutes behind.
If we can have a roll call, please. Trustee Marquez.
Report out on closed session from March 20, 2024.
Report out on closed session from April 3. No action was taken.
So welcome, everybody. Cerro cinco uno, tres, siete y precione.
Okay, so with that, we are on changes to the agenda.
Thank you, everyone. Oral communication. We have two speakers.
So that brings us to bond consent items. Do we have a motion to approve?
And now we have Will here for 10.1 phase two solar.
All right, so 11.1 citizens measure you oversight committee.
Okay, we are on consent items. Is there a motion to approve?
We have no action items. Oh, sorry, I skipped over.
Board and superintendent reports. Who would like to start?
Information on San Mateo county investment fund. Any questions on that
correspondence? We received an email from the speaker that we had tonight
Possible other business suggested items for the future.
Changes to the board meeting calendar. Lightning round meeting.
What are we at 7:41. Do we have a motion to adjourn?
